item.description:
feat(app): first-launch onboarding flow

- Added a first-launch onboarding flow: Welcome → permissions (microphone + screen recording) → sign-in → done.
- All onboarding steps now use consistent centered content alignment with fade-plus-offset transitions for forward/back navigation.
- Onboarding resumes at the last step after app restart via `OnboardingState.lastStep`; title-bar close bookmarks progress, while explicit Skip / Get started completes the flow.
- Settings → Help now includes Restart onboarding, which resets onboarding state and reopens the welcome flow.
- Sign-in OAuth buttons now show provider marks (Google G + GitHub octocat).
- Post-onboarding sign-in surface now uses the Recappi brand LogoTile and fixed-width buttons so loading text no longer truncates.
- UI test suppression auto-applies for `RECAPPI_TEST_OPEN_CLOUD_WINDOW=1`, so Cloud smoke fixtures are not blocked by onboarding.
- Replaced the blank GitHubMark.png asset with a proper 256×256 GitHub mark.
